completed_scope: Expanded lib/zatca-engine.ts with ready/submitted states, XML structure validation, hash-chain helpers, and submission-ready payload builder.
Added reusable multi-country foundation in lib/country-foundation.ts.
Added reusable intelligence layer in lib/intelligence-layer.ts for transaction, inventory, and report signals.
Added reusable reporting depth helpers in lib/report-analytics.ts for comparison metrics, VAT trend, and P&L detail.
Integrated Phase 2 transaction cards into components/workflow/TransactionForm.tsx.
Integrated comparison, trend, and intelligence cards into components/workspace/AccountingReportPage.tsx.
Enriched backend access and audit endpoints in backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/AccessProfileController.php and backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/ReportController.php.

frontend_tests: npx vitest run lib/zatca-engine.test.ts lib/intelligence-layer.test.ts lib/report-analytics.test.ts

open_scope: Connect ZATCA submission boundary to real signing material and transport adapter.
Extend backend/frontend access profile typing if the new RBAC metadata needs to be consumed directly by the client.
Add authenticated runtime browser evidence for the new Phase 2 UI surfaces when a live session is required.
